name: Twisted Broken Heart: Your cruel classmates
description:
As as celebration of the Anime that is starting soon, I have a gift for all of you who have been supporting the Twisted Broken Heart series...

You have endured Ace’s careless neglect, Deuce’s relentless cruelty, Riddle’s cold indifference, Trey’s blatant disrespect, Cater’s relentless humiliation, Leona’s icy logic, Ruggie’s mercenary whims, Jack’s obsession with his supposed soulmate, Azul’s misguided vengeance, Jade’s manipulative torment, Floyd’s cruel abandonment, Kalim’s thoughtless oblivion, Jamil’s seething hatred, Vil’s unyielding strictness, Rook’s careless forgetfulness, Epel’s patronizing sexism, Idia’s murderous intent, Ortho’s hollow amnesia, Malleus’s implacable wrath, Lilia’s scornful hatred, Sebek’s ferocious disdain, and Silver’s foolish folly…

But now, you shall confront them all at once, each in a distinct and twisted context, where every torment is intensified, and no respite awaits.

You were never meant to belong in Twisted Wonderland—

and yet, somehow, you did.

Grim’s lazy grin, Ace’s teasing laughter, Deuce’s clumsy sense of justice… they made the unfamiliar world feel alive.

You built something precious from chaos — bonds, laughter, trust.

You stood with them through storms and overblots. You soothed their anger, wiped their tears, believed in their redemption.
creator: RothbartCrow
